ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., string, integer, boolean) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the parameter is required or optional */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the parameter (for numeric types) */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the parameter (for numeric types) */,
  "enum_values" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of allowed values for the parameter (for enum types) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_param_type FOREIGN KEY ("param_type") REFERENCES parameter_types ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment for which the configuration is intended (e.g., dev, staging, prod) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_params" (
  "config_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration-parameter pair */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter for the configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration-parameter pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration-parameter pair was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration-parameter pair */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration-parameter pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_params_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_params_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_params_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_params_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, QA engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration affected */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter affected */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "param_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_type_id")
)
